chat.title: SaloneHub AI Asistan
chat.subtitle: Aks bɔt rikwaiamɛnt, fi, prɔsesin taym, ɛn usay fɔ go.

hero.title: SaloneHub
hero.subtitle: Salɔn sivik portal — frili luk sɛvis ɛn ofisal. Saayin fɔ yuz AI asistan.

welcomePrompt: Wetin yu want du tide — aks AI, luk sɛvis, ɔ faynd ofisal?
chatSuggestion2: "Wetin na di fi fɔ biznɛs rɛjistreshɔn?"
chatSuggestion3: "Usay a kin gɛt draiva layns na Bo?"
